perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young female model stands in a curated indoor studio space, initially wearing a black patterned jacket over a black skirt and a beret; she adjusts her hat and smiles. (2) The scene cuts to a variation where she wears a white t-shirt under the same jacket and lifts one leg playfully. (3) Next, she appears in a long white lace-accented dress layered under the jacket, putting the hood up. (4) She then transitions to a white button-down shirt and a black beanie, posing with her hands on her hips. (5) In the final look, she wears a black bucket hat and a long oversized white shirt before walking out of the frame to the left, revealing a wall logo behind her.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop track begins immediately with a consistent rhythmic beat. (2) No vocals are detected throughout the entire duration. (3) The background music maintains a steady energy level without any significant transitions or ambient interference until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text 'Garmy羽織系列 穿搭' appears at the top throughout. (2) Functional labels appear on the right for each outfit: '羊毛貝雷帽 黑色' (Black Wool Beret), '大人休閒長襪 心花開藍' (Adult Casual Socks - Blooming Blue). (3) Subsequent labels update with outfit changes: '短版長袖上衣 愛心餅乾白' (Short Sleeve Top - Heart Cookie White), '長版洋裝單穿' (Long Dress Style), 'HAHA毛帽 黑色' (HAHA Beanie Black), '撞色系運動襪 白底灰' (Contrast Sports Socks - White/Grey), '帶繩單面漁夫帽 黑色' (Drawstring Bucket Hat Black), '大人休閒長襪 心花開粉' (Adult Casual Socks - Blooming Pink).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Outfit Demo 1 -> Outfit Demo 2 -> Outfit Demo 3 -> Outfit Demo 4 -> Outro

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young Asian female with long dark hair and bangs, wearing various pieces from a casual, patterned fashion collection.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist studio set up like a living room with a rattan-fronted cabinet, a small table lamp, a round wooden coffee table, a jute rug, and a logo on the back wall reading 'haha baby' with Japanese text.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, soft, and even studio lighting.
visual_scene_and_style.colorTone: Natural and warm with clean white walls.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a fashion lookbook to promote the 'Garmy' clothing series by the brand 'haha baby'. By showcasing one central jacket styled in four different ways, it demonstrates the product's versatility and appeals to customers looking for casual, trendy, and mix-and-match fashion options.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of clothing items with corresponding text labels and brand logo on the wall.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of descriptive text overlays for every fashion item shown; consistent minimalist studio aesthetic.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets a young, fashion-conscious demographic in Taiwan, utilizing a format popular on social media platforms like Instagram Reels and TikTok for quick product discovery.
